channel.title: Nitya's Notes
channel.description: Writing and notes from Nitya Sridhar.

item.title: LEARN THE FUNDAMENTALS
item.description: phrases I carry around like talismans

item.title: On the Packaging of Discovery
item.description: Notes from Prussian Blue, the first chapter of When We Cease to Understand the World. Optimization rarely appears to lead to discovery

item.title: People that worked on the same idea for decades
item.description: I collect examples of people that worked on iterations of the same idea over the course of decades, before landing on their magnum opus

item.title: What I learned from running
item.description: refusing to take the Faustian bargain: how lazy do you need to be to keep going?
